title: bidens pilosa var. bipinnata
intro: Bidens pilosa var. bipinnata, also known as the bipinnate beggar ticks or hairy beggar lice, is a variety of the Bidens pilosa plant, a type of flowering plant in the aster family native to Asia and Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bidens pilosa var. bipinnata include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and improving digestive health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as infusions and decoctions, have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues.
